brief_notes: Well-organized neuroscience paper with 5 figures, 2 tables. Spot-checked numbers all match extraction: spine/shaft transmission rates 0.55±0.09 / 0.16±0.03 at P8-10, 0.67±0.07 / 0.23±0.03 at P12-13; domain extent 18.7±6.1 / 22.5±6.4; synapses per domain 3.2±1.7 / 6.0±3.2; density 1.4±0.7 / 2.6±1.0; fraction covered 27.2±16.2% / 61.3±29.4%; synapses in domains 46.2±7.4% / 72±23.2%; p<10^-9; 25±20% / 9±9% silent; 59%/61% barrages. Good structure with methods, results by claim, discussion.
